responsibilities: Lead and grow a team of 6-12 software engineers through hiring, onboarding, mentorship, and performance reviews
Partner with product managers to translate business requirements into actionable, prioritized engineering roadmaps
Conduct regular 1:1 meetings to support career growth, address blockers, and provide actionable feedback to engineers
Drive sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives to ensure predictable and high-quality delivery
Manage performance reviews, promotion cases, and compensation planning in collaboration with HR business partners
Remove organizational and technical blockers that impede team velocity and cross-team collaboration
Balance technical debt reduction with feature delivery to maintain long-term codebase health and team morale
Collaborate with senior leadership to define hiring plans, team structure, and quarterly engineering OKRs
Foster an inclusive team culture that encourages psychological safety, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning
Escalate and coordinate response to critical production incidents, ensuring timely resolution and postmortems
